Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a list of activities in a global supply chain process The activities are SS Supplier Selection OP Order Placement RC Receive Components QI Quality Inspection CA Component Assembly PT Product Testing PK Packaging WS Warehouse Storage DT Distribution AS After Sales Support

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are to create a temporal profile as a Python dictionary For every pair of activities A B such that in at least one trace B eventually follows A not necessarily immediately we need to assign an average time and standard deviation

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Given the activities we can assume a typical linear order But note after distribution DT we have after sales support AS Also note that after the product is stored in the warehouse WS it might be stored for a variable time until distribution DT

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: But from the description we can infer a typical order SS OP RC QI CA PT PK WS DT AS

Name: Validation - PE
Text: In a linear process without any branching every pair Ai Aj with i less than j will appear in every trace So we have to consider all pairs

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Given the ambiguity we will assume that the time between two activities A and B where B eventually follows A is the time from the completion of A to the completion of B

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We will base our estimates on typical scenarios in a global supply chain

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We will assign adjacent pairs SS OP 3600 1800 OP RC 2592000 432000 RC QI 7200 3600 QI CA 3600 1800 CA PT 1800 600 PT PK 3600 1800 PK WS 1800 720 WS DT 604800 172800 DT AS 3600 1800

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For any pair Ai Aj with i less than j average time equals the sum of the adjacent average times and standard deviation equals the square root of the sum of the squared adjacent standard deviations

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For SS RC average equals 3600 plus 2592000 giving 2595600 and the standard deviation is obtained from the square root of 1800 squared plus 432000 squared

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For SS CA average equals 3600 plus 2592000 plus 7200 plus 3600 giving 2606400 and the standard deviation is obtained from the square root of the sum of the corresponding squared deviations

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For SS DT average equals 3218400 and for OP AS average also equals 3218400 with standard deviation approximately 465304

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The problem says a representative subset so we do not have to include all 45 pairs We will include all adjacent pairs and a few non adjacent representative pairs

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We will create the dictionary temporal profile with adjacent pairs and non adjacent pairs SS RC 2595600 432004 SS CA 2606400 432023 SS DT 3218400 465304 OP AS 3218400 465304 CA AS 615600 172821
